response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, distributed systems, and infrastructure, with a strong background in C++ and large-scale systems. However, his experience is primarily in web, mobile, and embedded systems, with limited direct exposure to cloud architecture, DevOps, or technical leadership in a cloud compute platform context. His recent roles focus on AI-agent infrastructure and pricing platforms rather than cloud compute leadership.
strengths: Strong C++ experience (e.g., National Instruments, NI LabWindows/CVI)
Proven track record in building large-scale systems and distributed infrastructure (e.g., Dunnhumby, Optilyz)
Demonstrated leadership in mentoring and technical workshops (e.g., Selenium course, TDD workshops)
concerns: Limited direct cloud architecture or DevOps experience (no AWS/GCP/Azure leadership mentioned)
No explicit experience in technical leadership roles for cloud compute platforms or internal platforms
Most recent work (re:cinq) focuses on AI-agent infrastructure rather than cloud compute leadership
